rule CDB_Critical_Ollama_Memory_Leak_Vulnerabilit {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Critical Ollama Memory Leak Vulnerability Exposes 300,000 Servers Globally"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-05-07"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-INGEST" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}
